item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: No Other Land, 2024
item.description:
This film made by a Palestinian-Israeli collective shows the destruction of the occupied West Bank's Masafer Yatta by Israeli soldiers and the alliance which develops between the Palestinian activist Basel and Israeli journalist Yuval.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: Joint Security Area, 2000
item.description:
Two North Korean soldiers are killed in the border area between North and South Korea, prompting an investigation by a neutral body. The sergeant is the shooter, but the lead investigator, a Swiss-Korean woman, receives differing accounts from the two sides.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: Memories of Murder, 2003
item.description:
A sadistic serial rapist and murderer of young women terrorizes a small province in 1980s South Korea. To prevent further crimes, three increasingly desperate detectives with conflicting methods race against time to unravel the violent mind of the killer in a futile effort to solve the case.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: Rear Window, 1954
item.description:
A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors from his apartment window and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: A Taxi Driver, 2017
item.description:
May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journalist with a hidden agenda, Man-seob takes the job.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to favorites: Soul, 2020
item.description:
Joe Gardner is a middle school teacher with a love for jazz music. After a successful audition at the Half Note Club, he suddenly gets into an accident that separates his soul from his body and is transported to the You Seminar, a center in which souls develop and gain passions before being transported to a newborn child. Joe must enlist help from the other souls-in-training, like 22, a soul who has spent eons in the You Seminar, in order to get back to Earth.

Added to favorites from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: The Mauritanian, 2021
item.description:
The true story of the Mauritanian Mohamedou Ould Slahi, who was held at the U.S military's Guantanamo Bay detention center without charges for over a decade and sought help from a defense attorney for his release.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: In Time, 2011
item.description:
In the not-too-distant future, the aging gene has been switched off. To avoid overpopulation, time has become the currency and the way people pay for luxuries and necessities. The rich can live forever, while the rest struggle to negotiate for their immortality. A poor young man who suddenly comes into a fortune of time finds himself on the run from a corrupt police force known as the "time keepers".

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Anora, 2024
item.description:
A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: 20 Days in Mariupol, 2023
item.description:
As the Russian invasion begins, a team of Ukrainian journalists trapped in the besieged city of Mariupol struggle to continue their work documenting the war's atrocities.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Triangle of Sadness, 2022
item.description:
A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged, alcoholic captain. What first appears Instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island in a struggle of hierarchy.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Ennio, 2022
item.description:
A portrait of Ennio Morricone, the most popular and prolific film composer of the 20th century, the one most loved by the international public, a two-time Oscar winner and the author of over five hundred unforgettable scores.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Honeyland, 2019
item.description:
When nomadic beekeepers break Honeyland’s basic rule (take half of the honey, but leave half to the bees), the last female beehunter in Europe must save the bees and restore natural balance.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Another Round, 2020
item.description:
Four stagnant high school teachers decide to test out a theory that maintaining a constant level of intoxication will improve their overall lives.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: The Chair, 2022
item.description:
After Reese brings home an antique chair, a series of horrific events follow, leading him to question if it's a malevolent spirit the chair possesses or the darkness inside his own mind.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Investigation of a Citizen Above Suspicion, 1970
item.description:
Rome, Italy. After committing a heinous crime, a senior police officer exposes evidence incriminating him because his moral commitment prevents him from circumventing the law and the social order it protects.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: The Kid with a Bike, 2011
item.description:
Abandoned by his father, a young boy is left in the hands of an unqualified childcare provider.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: For Sama, 2019
item.description:
A love letter from a young mother to her daughter, the film tells the story of Waad al-Kateab’s life through five years of the uprising in Aleppo, Syria as she falls in love, gets married and gives birth to Sama, all while cataclysmic conflict rises around her. Her camera captures incredible stories of loss, laughter and survival as Waad wrestles with an impossible choice– whether or not to flee the city to protect her daughter’s life, when leaving means abandoning the struggle for freedom for which she has already sacrificed so much.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Paradise Now, 2005
item.description:
Two childhood friends are recruited for a suicide bombing in Tel Aviv.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Sugarcane, 2024
item.description:
An investigation into abuse and missing children at an Indian residential school in Canada ignites a reckoning on the nearby Sugarcane Reserve.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Soul, 2020
item.description:
Joe Gardner is a middle school teacher with a love for jazz music. After a successful audition at the Half Note Club, he suddenly gets into an accident that separates his soul from his body and is transported to the You Seminar, a center in which souls develop and gain passions before being transported to a newborn child. Joe must enlist help from the other souls-in-training, like 22, a soul who has spent eons in the You Seminar, in order to get back to Earth.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Lion, 2016
item.description:
A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: The White Tiger, 2021
item.description:
An ambitious Indian driver uses his wit and cunning to escape from poverty and rise to the top. An epic journey based on the New York Times bestseller.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Send Help, 2026
item.description:
Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Persepolis, 2007
item.description:
In 1970s Iran, Marjane 'Marji' Satrapi watches events through her young eyes and her idealistic family of a long dream being fulfilled of the hated Shah's defeat in the Iranian Revolution of 1979. However as Marji grows up, she witnesses first hand how the new Iran, now ruled by Islamic fundamentalists, has become a repressive tyranny on its own.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Divinelink added to watchlist: Life Is Sweet, 1991
item.description:
Just north of London live Wendy, Andy, and their twenty-something twins, Natalie and Nicola. Wendy clerks in a shop, Andy is a cook who forever puts off home remodeling projects, Natalie is a plumber and Nicola is jobless. This film is about how they interact and play out family, conflict and love.

Added to watchlist from Divinelink.

item.title: Backrooms, 2026 - ★★★☆☆
item.description:
A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

Watched on 2026-07-20.

item.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit, 1988 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
Toon star Roger is worried that his wife Jessica is playing pattycake with someone else, so the studio hires detective Eddie Valiant to snoop on her. But the stakes are quickly raised when Marvin Acme is found dead and Roger is the prime suspect.

Watched on 2026-07-17.

item.title: Decision to Leave, 2022 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
From a mountain peak in South Korea, a man plummets to his death. Did he jump, or was he pushed? When detective Hae-joon arrives on the scene, he begins to suspect the dead man’s wife Seo-rae. But as he digs deeper into the investigation, he finds himself trapped in a web of deception and desire.

Watched on 2026-07-14.

item.title: Dogman, 2023 - ★★★★☆
item.description:
A boy, bruised by life, finds his salvation through the love of his dogs.

Watched on 2026-07-12.

item.title: The Florida Project, 2017 - ★★★☆☆
item.description:
The story of a precocious six year-old and her ragtag group of friends whose summer break is filled with childhood wonder, possibility and a sense of adventure while the adults around them struggle with hard times.

Watched on 2026-07-11.

item.title: The Lunchbox, 2013 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
A mistaken delivery in Mumbai's famously efficient lunchbox delivery system (Mumbai's Dabbawallahs) connects a young housewife to a stranger in the dusk of his life. They build a fantasy world together through notes in the lunchbox. Gradually, this fantasy threatens to overwhelm their reality.

Watched on 2026-07-09.

item.title: The Sheep Detectives, 2026 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

Watched on 2026-07-06.

item.title: Manhunter, 1986 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
FBI Agent Will Graham, retired after catching notorious cannibal Hannibal Lecter, returns to duty to engage in a risky cat-and-mouse game with Lecter to capture a new killer.

Watched on 2026-07-05.

item.title: Obsession, 2026 - ★★★★☆
item.description:
After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

Watched on 2026-07-03.

item.title: Together for Palestine, 2025 - ★★★★★
item.description:
Broadcast of the "Together for Palestine" charity concert organized by Brian Eno along with several artists to raise funds and awareness for Palestinian civilians affected by the ongoing war in Gaza.

Watched on 2026-07-02.

item.title: The Worst Person in the World, 2021 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

Watched on 2026-06-30.

item.title: One Battle After Another, 2025 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

Watched on 2026-06-29.

item.title: BlacKkKlansman, 2018 - ★★★★½
item.description:
Colorado Springs, late 1970s. Ron Stallworth, an African American police officer, and Flip Zimmerman, his Jewish colleague, run an undercover operation to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan.

Watched on 2026-06-25.

item.title: Insidious: The Red Door, 2023 - ★★½☆☆
item.description:
To put their demons to rest once and for all, Josh Lambert and a college-aged Dalton Lambert must go deeper into The Further than ever before, facing their family's dark past and a host of new and more horrifying terrors that lurk behind the red door.

Watched on 2026-06-20.

item.title: The Killer, 2023 - ★★☆☆☆
item.description:
After a fateful miss, an assassin battles his employers, and himself, on an international manhunt he insists isn't personal.

Watched on 2026-06-19.

item.title: The Trial of the Chicago 7, 2020 - ★★★★½
item.description:
What was supposed to be a peaceful protest turned into a violent clash with the police. What followed was one of the most notorious trials in history.

Watched on 2026-06-16.

item.title: Still Walking, 2008 - ★★★½☆
item.description:
A family gathers together for a commemorative ritual whose nature only gradually becomes clear.

Watched on 2026-06-14.

item.title: The Girl Who Cried Pearls, 2025 - ★★★★☆
item.description:
A poor boy’s love for a girl whose tears turn to pearls leads him into a perilous bargain between love, greed, and survival.

Watched on 2026-06-13.

item.title: Tetris, 2023 - ★★★★☆
item.description:
In 1988, American video game salesman Henk Rogers discovers the video game Tetris. When he sets out to bring the game to the world, he enters a dangerous web of lies and corruption behind the Iron Curtain.

Watched on 2026-06-12.

item.title: No Other Land, 2024 - ★★★★★
item.description:
This film made by a Palestinian-Israeli collective shows the destruction of the occupied West Bank's Masafer Yatta by Israeli soldiers and the alliance which develops between the Palestinian activist Basel and Israeli journalist Yuval.

Watched on 2026-06-05.
